'''falupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackaloo|crackaloo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackaloo|crackaloo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| falupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fælipith|fælipith]] || [[word:fælipij|fælipij]] || [[word:fælipish|fælipish]] || [[word:fælipi|fælipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:faluluputh|faluluputh]] || [[word:falulupuj|falulupuj]] || [[word:falulupush|falulupush]] || [[word:falulupu|falulupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:faluputh|faluputh]] || [[word:falupuj|falupuj]] || [[word:falupush|falupush]] || [[word:falupu|falupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:falufpufth|falufpufth]] || [[word:falufpufj|falufpufj]] || [[word:falufpufsh|falufpufsh]] || [[word:falufpuf|falufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:faluputhu|faluputhu]] || [[word:falupuju|falupuju]] || [[word:falupushu|falupushu]] || [[word:falupuku|falupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:faluputh|faluputh]] || [[word:falupuj|falupuj]] || [[word:falupush|falupush]] || [[word:falupu|falupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:faluputhul|faluputhul]] || [[word:falupujul|falupujul]] || [[word:falupushul|falupushul]] || [[word:falupukul|falupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:falupuuthuthu|falupuuthuthu]] || [[word:falupuujuju|falupuujuju]] || [[word:falupuushushu|falupuushushu]] || [[word:falupuuku|falupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:faluputhun|faluputhun]] || [[word:falupujun|falupujun]] || [[word:falupushun|falupushun]] || [[word:falupukun|falupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:faluputhuoro|faluputhuoro]] || [[word:falupujuoro|falupujuoro]] || [[word:falupushuoro|falupushuoro]] || [[word:falupukuoro|falupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
